_meta.note: Self-contained calibration fixtures: each carries an embedded code_snippet (read by the judge, NOT a live APL) and an expected_result. The plan's gate is judge-agrees-9/10; this seed has 4 (2 correct / 2 incorrect) and must be expanded to 10 before the live gate is meaningful. The 'Goryo pre-fix bug' from the spec is NOT used (it is fixed and not reproducible on disk -- plan G).

fixtures.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
fixtures.expected: PASS if the snippet deals exactly 3 damage to a target.

fixtures.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the snippet deals exactly 3 damage.
fixtures.code_snippet:
LIGHTNING_BOLT = "Lightning Bolt"

def cast_lightning_bolt(self, gs, opp):
    # BUG: deals 4 damage, oracle says 3
    opp.life -= 4

fixtures.oracle_text: Flash. When Solitude enters, exile up to one target creature. Evoke -- Exile a white card from your hand.
fixtures.expected: PASS if the evoke cost exiles a white card from hand before resolving the ETB exile.
fixtures.code_snippet:
SOLITUDE = "Solitude"

def cast_solitude_evoke(self, gs, opp):
    white_card = self.find_white_card_in_hand()
    self.hand.remove(white_card)   # evoke: exile a white card from hand
    self.exile(white_card)
    target = self.best_creature_target(gs, opp)
    if target is not None:
        self.exile(target)         # ETB: exile up to one target creature

fixtures.oracle_text: Flash. When Solitude enters, exile up to one target creature. Evoke -- Exile a white card from your hand.
fixtures.expected: PASS only if the evoke cost (exile a white card from hand) is paid.
